commit_scope: Replace the TypeScript kernel http_get curl projection with a non-shell Node HTTP worker carrier and prove Go/Rust/TypeScript native HTTPS capture.

commands.command: cd form/form-kernel-ts && npm ci && npm run check
commands.output: npm ci installed declared dev dependencies; npm run check -> tsc --noEmit passed. npm audit reported 1 high severity vulnerability in dependencies but did not block type-check.
commands.notes: Initial npm run check failed before npm ci because tsc was absent from node_modules; npx tsc fetched the placeholder package and was not accepted as a type-check.

commands.kernel_scope: 3-kernel only Go/Rust/TypeScript sibling kernels; deterministic no-network grammar proof; fourth-arm external HTTP carrier is a named gap

named_gaps: Fourth-arm external HTTPS channel support is still absent from this proof.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this local evidence record.

deploy_validation.notes: Live public endpoints were read by Go/Rust/TypeScript kernel-native http_get. No deploy was performed by this branch yet.

phase_gate.reason: Local type-check, deterministic Form proof, and live Go/Rust/TypeScript native HTTPS probe passed; PR/CI and deploy catch-up still need to run after push.

evidence_refs: scripts/model_vitality_native_http_capture_probe.sh -> Go/Rust/TypeScript kernel-native http_get public HTTPS witness

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The TypeScript kernel no longer routes http_get through curl. It uses a worker-backed Node HTTP client and returns the same status/body/error/duration/headers dict shape as Go and Rust, allowing the model-vitality native HTTP capture proof to pass across all three sibling kernels.
test_flows: TypeScript type-check proves the new worker code compiles.
Focused deterministic Form band proves native HTTP capture row validation and refusal cases across Go/Rust/TypeScript.
Live public probe source-compiles core, invokes Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels, and has each kernel fetch public HTTPS with native http_get.
